name: my18e20_driver

_comments.chips: 该包支持运行的芯片型号，all表示无芯片限制
_comments.fw: 该包依赖的特定固件如ulab、lvgl,all表示无固件依赖

description: A MicroPython driver for MY18E20/DS18B20 OneWire temperature sensors, supporting multi-device scanning, parasitic power mode, resolution configuration, and CRC-8 validation
author: 李清水
